dialogueChunks.intro: The initial investigation raised more questions than answers. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} connected to something larger, and the clues point toward {location_hint}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type} have been guarding a second site near {location_hint}. Whatever the {quest_threat} is, they seem to understand it better than we do. We need you to retrieve the {quest_item} fragments from that site to piece together the pattern.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every piece of evidence brings us closer to understanding. Bring back what you can from the guarded area.

dialogueChunks.intro: We are not the only ones investigating the {quest_focus}. {target_npc} reports that outsiders have been asking questions about the same sites, and they do not seem friendly.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: These strangers want the {quest_stakes} for themselves, and they have already ransacked one site near {location_hint}. If we do not act quickly, every trace of the {quest_focus} will vanish into their hands.
dialogueChunks.outro: Reach the remaining site before they do. Recover {quest_item} before it disappears.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} studied the evidence you brought back and turned grim. The {quest_focus} is not just a curiosity: it is a warning.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The markings describe something that happened here before, something involving the {quest_threat}. If the pattern repeats, the {quest_stakes} could be at risk. We need {quest_item} from the site near {location_hint} to confirm whether the warning is real.
dialogueChunks.outro: The remaining clues are in dangerous territory, but we cannot afford to guess. Bring back the evidence that confirms the warning.
